data.title: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) - Management Consulted
data.content:
Through both TCS and their 67 subsidiaries, the firm provides a variety of information technology-related products and services. These primarily include business process outsourcing, application development, enterprise software, hardware sizing, capacity planning, consulting, payment processing, software management, and technology education services. TCS has established software products such as TCS BaNCS and TCS MasterCraft.

Service at TCS are organized into the following service lines: Application development and maintenance, Asset leverage solutions, Assurance services, Business process outsourcing, Consulting, Engineering and Industrial services, Enterprise solution, and IT infrastructure services. [...] With a global network delivery model, TCS offers management services, e-business, architecture and technology consulting, engineering, application development and maintenance, security, and infrastructure development to organizations in over 53 countries worldwide. The primary specialization of the firm, and why many leading businesses call on its expertise, is for customized software packages. TCS serves a variety of industries with services including finance, telecommunication, banking, insurance, retail, and many others. Additionally, TCS belongs to the Tata Group, which is one of India’s largest business conglomerates – made up of over 95 companies across 6 continents.

data.title: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd Company Profile - GlobalData
data.content:
Tata Consultancy Services Ltd (TCS), a subsidiary of Tata Sons Pvt Ltd, is a provider of information technology (IT) services. The company offers IT infrastructure services, engineering, and industrial services, business intelligence, business process outsourcing, and consulting services, cloud services, IoT and Digital Engineering, AI and data analytics. It also offers business solutions to various industries, including banking, financial services, communication, media, technology, insurance, life sciences and healthcare, retail, manufacturing, information services, Hi-Tech, education, energy and utilities, and hospitality. Its software products comprise TCS BaNCS, Ignio, TAP, TCS iON, TCS DigiBOLT, TCS Optumera, TCS OmniStore, TCS ADD, TCS HOBS, Quartz, Jile, and TCS MasterCraft. The [...] ## 2
